title: Where to Start with Money Work
subtitle: Five entry points into the Mindset money library, organised by what's pressing today
excerpt: A short reading that maps five entry points into the money section of this library, each matched to a different starting feeling: daily panic, a big goal, a specific block, a relationship issue, or no idea where the problem is.

content.text: A short map of five ways into the money section of this library. Most people have one or two things pressing when they arrive here. These entry points are organised around the feeling, not the theory.
If you wake up already gripped by it

Start with the daily panic practices: tapping for daily money panic, the energy statement for steady ground, the journal prompt for where in your body money panic sits. These are fast, five minutes, designed for a morning when the loop starts before you've properly woken up.
If you have a specific goal and it isn't moving

Start with the identity practices in Phase 2 of the 84-day arc, the ones on claiming a wealthy identity, believing in your capacity to earn, and releasing the feeling that a particular level of money isn't meant for you. The goal doesn't move when the identity hasn't updated to match it.
If you know the specific thing that's stuck

Go straight to the stuck section. Pricing. Asking for more. Money fights with a partner. The guilt of having more than your parents. The inherited money that does not feel like yours yet. Each one is built around a single stuck point with the full set of practices. Tapping. An energy statement. Journal prompts. A reading.
If money is fine but relationships around it aren't

Start with the relationship sections. Money fights with a partner. The pang when another woman does well. The tangle of money with parents. Relationship money work is often the most urgent and the least worked on.
If you don't know where the problem is

Start with the first tapping script or the journal prompt set on the money question you've been avoiding. Both are designed to locate the thing before working on it. The first tapping script runs in three minutes. The journal set runs in twenty. Either one will find something.
Written for homemade.education as a way in to the money section of the Mindset library.
